resultList.dtldesc: This spacious 4 BHK residential house, located in Thorrur, Hyderabad, offers a perfect combination of comfort, design, and modern living. The property is vaastu compliant and faces east, ensuring an abundance of natural light and positive energy throughout the day. Property SpecificationsWith a total built-up area of 2500 sqft spread over three floors, this unfurnished house is ideal for families looking for space, privacy, and convenience. The house is spread over a carpet area of 2500 sqft, providing ample room for a large family. It comprises ground plus two floors, each designed for maximum utility and comfort. The flooring in the entire house is a blend of granite and vitrified tiles, ensuring durability and a modern aesthetic. Ground Floor  The ground floor includes a well-sized bedroom, a common western-style bathroom with a geyser, a spacious living room, and a puja room for spiritual activities. The kitchen is equipped with a normal utility area attached to it, perfect for cooking and storage needs. There is also a balcony to enjoy the outdoors. First Floor  On the first floor, there are two bedrooms and two bathroomsone attached to the master bedroom and the other a common bathroom. Both bathrooms are western-style and equipped with geysers for added comfort. A balcony provides an additional space to relax or take in the views. Second Floor  The second floor features a single bedroom with an attached western-style bathroom, also equipped with a geyser. A balcony accompanies this floor, adding to the charm and spaciousness of the home.FacilitiesThis property is equipped with all the essential facilities to ensure a comfortable and convenient lifestyle. Covered parking is available, offering protection for your vehicle from the elements. The house also benefits from 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup, ensuring that daily activities are not interrupted. For added security, a security guard is present, and CCTVs are installed around the property, providing peace of mind to residents.LocalityThe property is ideally located in a well-established neighborhood with easy access to key amenities. It is situated just 1 km from the nearest school, making it convenient for families with children. Hospitals are located within 1.5 km, providing quick access to medical care. For shopping and entertainment, a mall is located between 6 to 10 km away. Banks and ATMs are also nearby, ensuring easy access to financial services.The area is well-connected by public transport, with buses and autos readily available. The railway station and metro station are both within a 20 km radius, offering convenient options for longer-distance travel.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience refined living with this stunning 3 BHK flat available for sale in RNR Fort View Towers, Attapur, Hyderabad. Conceptualized for convenience and comfort, this dwelling presents the ideal combination of contemporary living and strategic location.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 4th floor of a 9-storyed building, the dwelling occupies a spacious super area of 1635 sqft and is carefully designed to meet the demands of modern lifestyles.The three-bedroom semi-furnished apartment comes with the standard fittings of a wardrobe, lights, fans, and air conditioning. The three spacious bedrooms include two having attached western-style bathrooms and the other bathroom shared and equally well-equipped with geysers in all three. The living cum dining room is well-ventilated and ideal for family meals or easy nights. The modular kitchen is pre-fitted with a chimney and an in-built utility area, making it convenient for daily use.Two balconies, one leading from the kitchen and the other from a bedroom, have open views of the neighboring buildings and contribute to the overall ventilation and lighting of the house. The apartment is fitted with vitrified tile flooring everywhere and constructed following Vaastu principles, promoting positive energy flow and peaceful living. West-facing, the flat gets plenty of daylight in the daytime and improves the overall atmosphere of the house. FacilitiesThis well-rehabilitated residential complex provides a range of necessary facilities and lifestyle amenities. The flat comprises two covered car parking places, 24-hour water supply, and 100 power backup to provide seamless comfort. Security is provided by trained security guards and CCTV surveillance across the complex. The building boasts four high-speed elevators for convenient access. The premium amenities include a swimming pool, clubhouse, fully fitted gym, and a special kids play areaearning it a top pick for families looking for a balanced lifestyle.LocalityThe area is situated in a well-linked and upcoming locality close to Siri Pratap Residency, Attapur. It is near the major social infrastructure, thereby making life convenient and easily accessible. Prestigious schools are just 2 km away from the area, while hospitals are within a radius of 4 km, providing instant access to education and healthcare.For daily expenses and shopping, malls and supermarkets are within 5 km. There is good public transport with connectivity to other parts of the city. Banks and ATMs are in the vicinity, and the property enjoys the benefit of proximity to an expressway, further increasing commuting advantages. The nearest railway station is roughly 13 km from the location, adding to the areas overall connectivity.

The 2nd floor of this villa incorporates a mini hall, a bedroom with an attached bathroom, a home theatre room, and a balcony.::::::Furthermore, all the bathrooms of this villa are western fashioned.
